character.name: Disgaea Phantom Brave modern Nippon
character.prompt:
Disgaea Phantom Brave modern Nippon Ichi style chibi female battle mage,
3-head-tall super-deformed proportions with playful exaggerated curves,
huge head with massive expressive anime eyes and small sharp pupils,
bold thick outlines, flat cel-shaded coloring, high saturation,
long flowing platinum silver hair past shoulders with side bangs, head bare,
wearing frilly white and bright sky-blue robe with pink ribbon trim and large gold buttons,
oversized white pauldrons with star emblems,
flared sky-blue cape with pink polka-dot lining draped behind to knees,
soft fluffy hood resting on upper back behind neck, never on head,
oversized cartoony wooden staff with giant glowing cyan crystal orb in right hand,
brown leather belt with cute pouches,
young woman early 20s, cheerful energetic pose with slight tilt,
vibrant modern JRPG pixel art, candy-bright saturated palette,
crisp anime-inspired linework, dynamic sharp silhouette
